message.content:
@startuml
participant "Requester" as Requester
participant "PageLocsMgr" as PageLocsMgr
participant "MgrQueue" as MgrQueue <<thread>>
participant "StateTask" as StateTask
participant "StateQueue" as StateQueue <<thread>>
participant "RetrieveQueue" as RetrieveQueue <<thread>>
participant "RetrieverTask" as RetrieverTask

Requester -> RetrieverTask : Startup
Requester -> StateTask : Startup
Requester -> StateTask : start(doc, first_item, item_count)

note over StateTask : The document retrieval\noptimizes the order of\nthe items considering\nhow the user interacts.

StateTask -> MgrQueue : start_document(...)

loop [All Items]
    StateTask -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve(item)
    RetrieveQueue -> RetrieverTask : retrieve(item)
    ref over RetrieverTask : do item
    RetrieverTask -> RetrieveQueue : item_retrieved(item)
    RetrieveQueue -> StateTask : item_retrieved(item)
end

== Item already known ==

Requester -> PageLocsMgr : get_page_loc(item, offset)
PageLocsMgr -> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)

== Item needs to be retrieved (no yet in the list) ==

Requester -> PageLocsMgr : get_page_loc(item, offset)
PageLocsMgr -> MgrQueue : retrieve_asap(item)
MgrQueue -> StateTask : retrieve_asap(item)
StateTask -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve(item)
RetrieveQueue -> RetrieverTask : retrieve(item)
ref over RetrieverTask : do item
RetrieverTask -> RetrieveQueue : item_retrieved(item)
RetrieveQueue -> StateTask : item_retrieved(item)
StateTask -> MgrQueue : got_asap(item)
MgrQueue -> PageLocsMgr : got_asap(item)
PageLocsMgr -> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)
StateTask -> MgrQueue : end_document()
MgrQueue -> PageLocsMgr : end_document()

@enduml
